---

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (dependency updates, configuration changes)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style (Stage 1 passes locally).
- [ ] I have verified no security regressions are introduced (Stage 2 scanning).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works (Stage 3).
- [ ] I have checked the Terraform plan output (Stage 5) to ensure infrastructure changes are expected.
- [ ] The branch name follows the required format (`feature/*`, `bugfix/*`, `hotfix/*`, `chore/*`, `release/*`).
